Weapons — Male Human Rogue: 7
Strength: 14 (+2) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 12 (+1) Intelligence: 15 (+2) Wisdom: 14 (+2) Charisma: 18 (+4)
Background: Soldier Alignment: Lawful Good Deity: None
Ability Boosts: Dexterity: 1; Intelligence: 1; Strength: 2 Experience: 31379/34000 Level: 7 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 210/420
Ability Notes:
Grappler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Strength, Dexterity)
Ability Boosts: 4 to distribute
Second-Story Work: Has a 30' climb Speed
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +3
Feat Count: General; Origin Selectable Feature Count: Rogue (Rogue Subclass)
Feats: Grappler; Magic Initiate (Wizard) Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Rogue Features: Armor Training (Light); Cunning Action; Cunning Strike; Evasion; Expertise; Fast Hands; Reliable Talent; Rogue Subclass; Save Proficiency (Dexterity; Intelligence); Second-Story Work; Skill Proficiency (Choose 4 from Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, Persuasion, Sleight Of Hand, Stealth); Sneak Attack; Steady Aim; Thief; Thieves' Cant; Tool Proficiency (Thieves' Tools); Uncanny Dodge; Weapon Mastery; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Finesse Weapons; Light Weapons) Soldier Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Strength, Dexterity, Constitution); Savage Attacker; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Intimidation); Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Gaming Set)
Feature Notes:
Rogue Subclass: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +8 Insight: (wis) +2 Performance: (cha) +10
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +7 Persuasion: (cha) +4
Arcana: (int) +2 Investigation: (int) +8 Religion: (int) +2
Athletics: (str) +8 Medicine: (wis) +2 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +4 Nature: (int) +5 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +2
Skill Proficiency: Acrobatics; Athletics; Intimidation; Investigation; Nature; Performance
Expertise: Acrobatics; Athletics; Investigation; Performance
Tool Proficiency: Dragonchess Set: (wis); Thieves' Tools: (dex)
Languages: Abyssal; Common; Halfling; Primordial; Thieves' Cant
Skill Notes:
Expertise: +3 on 4 chosen proficient skills
Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Thieves'Cant: Language (Thieves' Cant; Choose 1 from any)
Reliable Talent: Scores at least a 10 on proficient skill and tool checks
Second-Story Work: +0' running jump distance
Combat
Hit Points: 34 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 12
Armor Training: Light Weapon Proficiency: Finesse Weapons; Light Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Battleaxe (+2 1d8+2 S [2h d10]; Topple); Blowgun (+2 1+2 P R25/100; Vex); Club (+5 1d4+2 B; Slow); Dagger (+5 1d4+2 P R20/60; Nick); Dart (+5 1d4+2 P R20/60; Vex); Flail (+2 1d8+2 B; Sap); Glaive (+2 1d10+2 S; Graze); Greataxe (+2 1d12+2 S; Cleave); Greatclub (+5 1d8+2 B; Push); Greatsword (+2 2d6+2 S; Graze); Halberd (+2 1d10+2 S; Cleave); Hand Crossbow (+5 1d6+2 P R30/120; Vex); Handaxe (+5 1d6+2 S R20/60; Vex); Heavy Crossbow (+2 1d10+2 P R100/400; Push); Javelin (+5 1d6+2 P R30/120; Slow); Lance (+2 1d10+2 P; Topple); Light Crossbow (+5 1d8+2 P R80/320; Slow); Light Hammer (+5 1d4+2 B R20/60; Nick); Longbow (+2 1d8+2 P R150/600; Slow); Longsword (+2 1d8+2 S [2h d10]; Sap); Mace (+5 1d6+2 B; Sap); Maul (+2 2d6+2 B; Topple); Morningstar (+2 1d8+2 P; Sap); Musket (+2 1d12+2 P R40/120; Slow); Pike (+2 1d10+2 P; Push); Pistol (+2 1d10+2 P R30/90; Vex); Quarterstaff (+5 1d6+2 B [2h d8]; Topple); Rapier (+5 1d8+2 P; Vex); Scimitar (+5 1d6+2 S; Nick); Shortbow (+5 1d6+2 P R80/320; Vex); Shortsword (+5 1d6+2 S; Vex); Sickle (+5 1d4+2 S; Nick); Sling (+5 1d4+2 B R30/120; Slow); Spear (+5 1d6+2 P [2h d8] R20/60; Sap); Trident (+2 1d8+2 P [2h d10] R20/60; Topple); Unarmed Strike (+5 1+2 B); War Pick (+2 1d8+2 P [2h d10]; Sap); Warhammer (+2 1d8+2 B [2h d10]; Push); Whip (+5 1d4+2 S; Slow)
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +7
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Cunning Action: Can use a bonus action to Dash, Disengage, or Hide
Cunning Strike: Can reduce Sneak Attack damage to inflict a choice of: poisoned (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), prone (save Dexterity negates) (reduces damage by 1d6 HP), or to move 15' after attacking without provoking opportunity attacks (reduces damage by 1d6 HP)
Fast Hands: Can use a bonus action to disarm a trap, open a lock, pick a pocket, or take a Utilize action
Grappler: Can both Damage and Grapple with an unarmed strike once per turn, has advantage on attacks on a grappled foe, and can move at full speed with a grappled foe of Medium size or smaller
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Sneak Attack: Inflicts +4d6 HP on attacks with advantage or on a foe threatened by another adjacent creature once per turn
Steady Aim: Can use a bonus action and forego moving to gain advantage on the next attack in the same turn
Uncanny Dodge: Can use a reaction to reduce the damage from a seen attacker by half
Weapon Mastery: Can use the mastery properties of 2 chosen kinds of simple or martial melee weapons
Save Proficiency: Dexterity; Intelligence
Save: Charisma: +4; Constitution: +1; Dexterity: +5; Intelligence: +5; Strength: +2; Wisdom: +2
Save Notes: Evasion: Successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failures yield half damage
Magic
Attack: W: +5 Spell DC: W: 13
Magic Notes: Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell once per long rest
Notes
Validation Warnings:
Nonproficient Weapon Penalty.Battleaxe: -3 attack

Nonproficient Weapon Penalty.Pistol: -3 attack
Nonproficient Weapon Penalty.Trident: -3 attack
